metadata.title: Re-reading the corpus under the strategic lenses — genuine block-by-block findings + gap backlog
metadata.frame: A GENUINE block-by-block read of all 91 substantive research write-ups (executed as five parallel full-text passes), each examined through [[spec-strategic-lenses]] (Sun Tzu / OSS Simple Sabotage manual / Analects). This SUPERSEDES an earlier cluster-level gloss. The full per-block table (block | lens | reframe | gap) lives in the rendered .md; this JSON carries the honest method, the consolidated GAP BACKLOG (~30 concrete enhancements the real read surfaced), and the synthesis. Pure interpretation - no new factual claims, nothing added to the proofs.
metadata.method: 5 parallel sub-reads, ~18-19 blocks each, every research/*.md read in full; per block: best-fit lens + one concrete reframe grounded in that block's actual content + a concrete gap or 'clean'. ~91 blocks covered (excludes the two lens blocks themselves).
metadata.relevance: Closes the re-read catalog honestly; the gap backlog is an actionable enhancement list across the corpus.
metadata.sources: Internal full-text read of the graded blocks (per-block table in the .md); lens texts verified in spec-strategic-lenses. No new external claims.

gap_backlog.summary: ~30 concrete enhancements surfaced by the genuine read - grouped. None are corrections; every block re-read coherent.

quantify_a_hidden_number.gap: per-bank HTM loss as % of equity + the concentration tail (not just the aggregate)
reconstruct/publish the per-bank HTM hole + concentration after the Feb-2025 problem-bank-data blackout; flag >400% CRE/capital banks
institution-level bank -> NDFI -> private-credit -> datacenter-SPV exposure map
quantify annual antimony/REE volume needed: defense vs AI
stress-test the ~91% common factor reversing; compute forced-selling to clear marks
which hyperscaler is most stranded without BYOP; model idle-GPU/capital cost
compute gig-vs-full-time wage/benefit loss; hidden U-6 equivalent

rectify_a_name_or_rebaseline.gap: track when policy decisions cited which (stale) shelter series
a unified, audited forward GPU-depreciation rate (e.g., 3yr) to make the margin-flattery visible
add the moral-authority / 正名 angle: nonprofit public trust traded for capital

map_a_transmission_or_sequence.gap: the rollover/de-rate break + duration assumption (how long does demand hold if a peg break forces a fire-sale?)
a formal Fed reaction-function decision-tree (when it would/wouldn't intervene)
recover the pause-letter sequence + count + whether they cited a memo (orchestrated vs emergent)
a chokepoint-loss propagation tree (collapse vs pivot, on what timeline)
map forced (sanctioned) vs chosen (BRICS opportunism) dollar-bypass flows
map the stablecoin-rail vs CBDC/digital-ID timeline coordination

governance_disclosure_and_misc.gap: a full-disclosure standard for SEC staff ties to the asset class regulated
statutory contemporaneous bulk disclosure of govt requests to platforms
forensic map of which stablecoin issuers can actually be censored/de-platformed by regulators
real-time custody-concentration monitoring / mandatory reserve distribution
connect insider-betting to the lack of a legal framework for political betting
tier addresses by systemic-risk relevance vs sanctions-compliance
integrate the Chinese-embassy comms-chokepoint into the surveillance-through-identity thread
retroactive shell-company/FARA check on Mezink + prior foreign-principal campaigns
ground *why* incumbents get chosen to re-platform onto tokenization (the political economy)
explain the policy-whipsaw causality (pre-Blanche mandate vs post-hoc cover)
separate the emotional ('neutral code') from the structural (proceeding against an overruled theory) by impact
track which equities lose their state anchor / miss 2026-29 timelines
live COMEX-LME-SGE spread + lease-rate dashboard; flag when dealers stop arbitraging
model the oil price floor given Iran/Russia flow losses
separate SEALSQ/WISeKey pipeline vs announced; roadmap vs equity-raise narrative
track which post-2008 deregulation enabled the 2025-26 AI-financing structures
what legislative/political failure would force the real names into daylight
board/investment-committee minutes would show deliberate vs opportunistic MGX multi-layer strategy

synthesis.summary: Confirmed by the full read, not assumed.

points.detail: Across all 91 blocks the contest is over legitimacy/TRUST (Sun Tzu 道, Confucius 信, the sabotage manual's target). Observed block by block, not posited.
正名 (rectification of names) - the project's grading discipline - is the countermeasure to the sabotage/disinformation it documents; the read found NO mislabeling in the corpus.
Every block re-read coherent; the ~30 gaps are enhancements (mostly 'quantify a number the block points at' or 'map a sequence'), not corrections.

non_claims: These re-reads are interpretation OVER the graded blocks; they add no new factual claims and nothing to the proofs.
The convergence on 'trust' is an analytical lens, not a claim that one actor engineers all of it.
The gap backlog is an enhancement list, not a list of errors - no block was found wrong.

limits: Honest execution of the re-read catalog: a genuine block-by-block read of all 91 substantive blocks (five parallel full-text passes), with the per-block table in the .md and the consolidated ~30-item gap backlog + synthesis here. Supersedes the earlier cluster-level gloss. Convergent finding (observed, not assumed): every thread reduces to a contest over legitimacy/trust (道/信), and the rectification-of-names method is itself the defense; no mislabeling found, no block wrong - the output is an enhancement backlog. Pure interpretation, no edges into the proofs. source: full-text read of the graded blocks; lens texts verified in spec-strategic-lenses.
